titleStmt.title: SII 40.299: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 299. (A.R. No. B. 344 of 1933.) Vēmavaram, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone built into the wall of the Mūlaṅkūri temple.
This is dated Śaka 1496, Bhāva, Jyēshṭha, śu. 15, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1574 A.D., June 4, Friday.

Records the grant of half of the income of the village Mullaṁgūru of Koṇḍavīṭi-sīma to the goddess Mullagūri-Śakti by Nāgaya-Nāyaniṁgāru, son of Kṛishṇama-Nāyaniṁgāru and grandson of Bokkasaṁ Koṇḍama-Nāyuḍu of the Vitartha-gōtra, on the occasion of lunar eclipse, who was enjoying the possession of the village, with the sanction of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁbulu 1496 Agunēṁṭi
bhāva saṁvvatsara jēṣṭa śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirājarājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa
śrīvīra śrīraṁggarāyadēvamahārāyalavāru ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvīsāmrā
jyamu cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu durgāparamēśvariyanē mulagūri śaktiki vitarthagōtra pavi
tṛṁḍaina bokkasaṁ koṁḍamanāyani pautruṁḍaina kuṣṇamanāyaniṁgāri putṛṁḍaina nā
gayanāyaniṁgāru daṁḍaṁ peṭṭi Iccina dharmaśāsanakramamēṭlannanu śrīraṁggarāyadēva
rāyala Ayyavāru māku pāliṁcciyiyyanavadhariṁccina koṁḍavīṭi śīmalōnu pū
ṁdu sāgivaccemullaṁgūru grāmaṁ 1 ki nagaranākalu prakāraṁ nagaredēvatā grāmā
rācanagariki sagamunnu kaṭaḍaganaka rācanagari sagamunnu
tathātithi sōmōparāga puṇyakālamaṁddunu
dānadhārāpūrvakamugānu trivācakamugā yistimi Āgrāmānagala
gānu yī mānyaṁ Istimi sakala
bhāgālu Anubhaviṁccumaniccina dharmaśāsanaṁ dhānapāla
śrī jēyunu
Digital edition of SII 40.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
